{{CargoOrgan
|name=Mecha Prosthesis
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10955
|idx=148
|description=Zhuge Liang's genius is now hands-on experience! Even his wooden dolls can keep a spare hand after being dismembered.
|skill=
|hp=1480
|def=191
|atk=144
|rush=148
|gene1=In Mecha Form, {race} ATK +80
|gene2=Stonehide RES +2%
|gene3=Per Mecha Form Tier, {race} ATK +20
Mecha Form Tiers: 9/9
|gene4=Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +30m
|gene7=Chance to trigger Stonehide +2% (Awakened)
|}}
